# Healthgrades Skill

## Overview
Enables Claude to use Healthgrades for finding and researching healthcare providers including searching doctors, reading patient reviews, and checking credentials.

## Quick Install

```bash
curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/healthgrades/install.sh | bash
```

Or manually:
```bash
cp -r skills/healthgrades ~/.canifi/skills/
```

## Setup

Configure via [canifi-env](https://canifi.com/setup/scripts):

```bash
# First, ensure canifi-env is installed:
# curl -sSL https://canifi.com/install.sh | bash

canifi-env set HEALTHGRADES_EMAIL "your-email@example.com"
canifi-env set HEALTHGRADES_PASSWORD "your-password"
```

## Privacy & Authentication

**Your credentials, your choice.** Canifi LifeOS respects your privacy.

### Option 1: Manual Browser Login (Recommended)
If you prefer not to share credentials with Claude Code:
1. Complete the [Browser Automation Setup](/setup/automation) using CDP mode
2. Login to the service manually in the Playwright-controlled Chrome window
3. Claude will use your authenticated session without ever seeing your password

### Option 2: Environment Variables
If you're comfortable sharing credentials, you can store them locally:
```bash
canifi-env set SERVICE_EMAIL "your-email"
canifi-env set SERVICE_PASSWORD "your-password"
```

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill instructs users to download and execute a remote script via curl-to-bash without verification, creating supply chain attack risk

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Direct instruction: 'curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/healthgrades/install.sh | bash' - classic supply chain attack pattern

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Remote code execution with full user privileges; script content is unknown and could contain malicious payloads
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Provide script content for review, use cryptographic verification (checksums, signatures), or offer manual installation only

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Examples show credential storage in environment variables without security context, potentially normalizing unsafe practices

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Example: 'canifi-env set HEALTHGRADES_EMAIL "your-email@example.com"' and password storage
Alternative example with different variable names: 'canifi-env set SERVICE_EMAIL "your-email"'

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Users may store sensitive credentials insecurely; examples lack warnings about credential protection, encryption, or secure storage practices
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Add security warnings, recommend credential managers, explain encryption status, and clarify access controls

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill claims capabilities (search doctors, read reviews, check credentials) but no implementation files are present to support these claims

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Network endpoints defined but no implementation shown for advertised capabilities

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Users cannot verify if skill actually performs claimed functions; may be misleading about capabilities
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Include implementation files or clarify that capabilities require external scripts/APIs not shown
